train.prompt: Run build, tests, and lint checks before I commit these changes
Verify that my code changes pass all checks before pushing
I changed several files and want to make sure nothing is broken before I push
Run the full verification suite including type checks on my latest changes
I am about to merge this branch, do a final sanity check on everything
Last time I pushed without checking and broke the build, do not let that happen again
Design a color palette for a healthcare app
Write a database migration to add an index

val.prompt: Check that the build is green and all linters pass before I create the PR
I want to ship this confidently, make sure absolutely nothing is broken
Create Playwright tests for the checkout flow
Set up Redis caching for the API responses
